description: userv1-adapter.ts imports from ../legacy/user-v1 — a compatibility-bridge import that warns the agent that local edits may break the V1 contract. The other two files import from the canonical ../users/user-v2 path.

findings.rationale: userv1-adapter.ts imports from `../legacy/user-v1`. This file is a known compatibility bridge — the agent must check the contract of the non-legacy variant before editing functions here.
